---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature, enhancement, or tool integration for the monorepo.
title: 'feat([scope]): '
labels: enhancement, triage
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when...")

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe the architecture or workflow of the new feature.

## Workspace / Bounded Context Scope

Please specify the affected workspace(s):

- [ ] `hub` (Developer Hub, API, & Core)
- [ ] `profile` (GitHub Profile Visualizer)
- [ ] `studio` (Design Tokens / Penpot / Assets)
- [ ] `tools` (MCP / CLI / Automation)
- [ ] `docs` (Docusaurus Knowledge Base)

## Technical Architecture & Impact

How should this feature be integrated under SOLID principles?

- Describe the impact on any `packages/core` library files (Core First Design).
- Highlight any necessary environment variables or Docker configuration updates.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockup references, or documentation links here.
